steps.title: Find the slope using two points on the line
steps.content: The line of best fit passes through $(0, 1)$ on the left and $(1,800, 16)$ on the right. The slope is: $$m = \frac{16 - 1}{1,800 - 0} = \frac{15}{1,800} = \frac{1}{120}$$

steps.title: Write the equation and substitute x = 1,200
steps.content:
With slope $\frac{1}{120}$ and y-intercept $1$, the line equation is $y = \frac{1}{120}x + 1$.
At $x = 1,200$: $$y = \frac{1}{120}(1,200) + 1 = 10 + 1 = 11$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
